title: Pokémon: Breeder Mini
notes: In Pokémon Sodate-ya-san mini (Pokémon Breeder Mini english title), a virtual pet game, the player takes on the role of the Day-Care Man. Professor Birch gives the player a choice of one of three eggs. The player's job is to hatch the egg. When it hatches, the player must care for the young Pokémon in ways such as feeding it, brushing it, and taking it out.
rom_name: Pokemon Breeder mini [tr En Mr. Blinky_snesy_Wa]
thumb_name: pokemon breeder mini tr en mr

title: Pokémon: Puzzle Collection
notes: Pokémon Puzzle Collection is a collection of different puzzle games such as: Shadow Puzzle, where different shapes are put together to make an image of a Pokémon; Motion Puzzle, a sliding game where an image of a Pokémon has to be unscrambled; Escape, where one has to move blocks to let a Pokémon out of a maze; and a bonus for completing most of your Minidex is the game Power On, a ‘Pipe Dream’-like game where one has to connect a Pikachu to a light bulb, creating a circuit.

title: Pokémon: Togepi's Great Adventure
notes: Togepi no Daibōken is an action puzzle game similar to Kirby Tilt 'n' Tumble in that the player controls a Togepi who is rolling around like a ball. Traditional controls are used rather than motion controls for movement, though the Pokémon mini system's built-in tilt sensor is occasionally used for escaping when Togepi gets stuck in a hole. Togepi was peacefully walking through the forest when a Fearow noticed it. The Fearow grabs Togepi and takes it to its nest on the top of a tower. Togepi tries to escape, but trips on a pebble, and starts rolling around. The player must guide Togepi down the stairs. Many hazards exist, including bottomless pits, cracked floors, bumpers and many more too numerous to list. Sometimes, the stairs are covered by a door, and puzzles must be solved to open them, such as rolling over floor switches or knocking other Pokémon into holes. At the end each tower is a boss Pokémon, who is fought when they also trip on a pebble and start rolling. Boss arenas are small platforms surrounded by a bottomless pit. They must by rolled into and knocked into the abyss to be defeated.

title: Pokémon: Party Mini
notes: Pokémon Party Mini is a collection of several minigames, including: Hitmonchan’s Boxing, where you shake the system to ‘punch’; Pikachu’s Rocket Start, a game where you have to launch off a starting line before another Pokémon; Bellossom’s Dance, a DDR-like game; Chansey’s Dribble, kick the ball to the finish line as quickly as possible; Slowking’s Judge, predict if the tennis ball will land in or out of the court; Sneasel’s Fakeout, a rock-paper-scissors-like game for two players; Battlefield, where two to six players battle for the highest score; and Celebi’s Clock, which is essentially a clock with date, alarm and stopwatch function.

title: DeathTrap
notes:
Sonic & Mario are in Hell but they have no intention to stay here
and they want to escape ! Plus , they have infinite lives too…
Don’t let them go !

title: Bat Trip
notes: Fly safely through the barriers, find the wind beneath your leathery wings and keep on flapping!

images.box_front: Images/Nintendo Pokemon Mini/Box - Front/North America/Bat Trip-01.png

title: Pac-It
notes: A Pac-Man clone for the Pokémon Mini.

title: PokeSnake
notes: Clone of Nokia Snake, no sound but the machine rumbles when you eat a fruit.

title: LightsOut
notes: The game is played on a 5x5 grid full of lights that can be either lit or unlit. The objective of the game is to turn off all the lit lights in as few moves as possible. Lights are changed by clicking on them but all adjacent buttons are then also changed. Making a change creates an effect pattern.

title: Pokémon: Pichu Bros. Mini
notes: Pichu Bros. mini is a collection of minigames similar to the earlier Pokémon Party mini. This game is based on the Pokémon anime, focusing on the titular Pichu Bros. and the Pichu Posse (a gang that consists of the Pichu Bros. and their friends that they regularly go on adventures with). The games include a skateboarding game where one of the brothers must avoid obstacles, a game where the player shakes the system to help Teddiursa eat big piles of fruit within a time limit, a whack-a-mole game where Smoochum must kiss a Diglett, and a hot air balloon game with Magby.
thumb_name: pichu bros mini t eng nikcdc v1

title: Flappy Bird
notes: Flappy Bird mini is a simple game where the player has to guide a bird through a level filled with pipes with only a small gap to pass.In the game, thrust needs to be maintained to navigate a level. The bird moves forward automatically and the player can only interact by tapping, making it flap its wings so it flies higher. As each passage has a different height, the player needs to tap or pause (causing the bird to dive down) to make sure it is able to pass. There is no end to the game, the goal is merely to get a high score and based on the total score different types of medals can be earned.

images.box_front: Images/Nintendo Pokemon Mini/Box - Front/North America/Flappy Bird-01.png
images.screenshot: Images/Nintendo Pokemon Mini/Screenshot - Game Title/Flappy Bird-01.png

title: Pokémon: Zany Cards
notes: Calling all card sharks! Classic card games in an all-new kind of mini-pak. Challenge your friends with the new infrared communications port. Perfect for travel or a quick game with the gang. When you're on your own, take on Misty, Brock and Team Rocket!

title: SOKOfun
notes: A sokoban-like for the Pokémon Mini.

title: P-Type
notes: R-Type clone for the Pokémon Mini.

title: Silver Falls Mini
notes:
A thrilling new horror game has launched for the Pokémon Mini console! As part of the Nintendo exclusive Silver Falls horror series, you can now take your adventure with you on the go, anywhere, anytime!

In Silver Falls MINI, manage a team of people just trying to get by with their lives. But watch out! Monsters have appeared on North Island. It is up to Wilma, a wise hunter, Bull, a burly lumberjack, Gold, a friend carpenter, Hogan, a lively electrician, and Oxa, a starry eyed dreamer, to defeat the monsters and make North Island safe again.

Manage your party members' stats by directing party members to do jobs. Look out! If they are in bad shape, they may fail. If they are happy and well fed, they'll do better at their jobs and even find useful items for battle!
rom_name: Silver Falls - Monsters In North Island (World) (Demo) (Aftermarket)
thumb_name: silver falls monsters in north island

title: GJPG
notes: A rhythm game demo made for the 2019 game jam.

notes: A runner game demo made for the 2019 game jam.

notes: Hamburger.... in space!!!

title: Mini Running Ant
notes: ou play as a ant, a must go as far as possible without touching a rock. Use Left and Right to avoid rocks. Press and hold any button to run instead of walk.

images.screenshot: Images/Nintendo Pokemon Mini/Screenshot - Gameplay/World/Mini Running Ant-01.png

title: Franky the Fruit Fly
notes: Help Frank make a cross-the-world trek. Discover what it's like to be a fruit fly before you squish them. And most important of all: Have fun doing so.

images.box_front: Images/Nintendo Pokemon Mini/Box - Front/World/Franky the Fruit Fly-01.png
images.screenshot: Images/Nintendo Pokemon Mini/Screenshot - Gameplay/World/Franky the Fruit Fly-01.png

title: Pokémon Psychic Seeds
notes:
Group Exeggcute and head towards the finish.
Try to find the hidden pokéball in each stage.
30 levels of platform puzzling action and over 30 Pokémon to catch!

title: Pazuru
notes: A remake of the unique puzzle game Pazuru, a game for the Nintendo 3DS. Use your ninja reflexes to solve puzzles in this easy to learn, hard to master puzzle game. Twist, bounce, warp and toggle your way through the levels. Collect all the stars and be a true ninja master!

Based on the popular web game, 2048 comes to the Pokémon mini!

Code and graphics by Zoranc.

title: Pokémon: Pinball Mini
notes:
With Pokémon Pinball Mini, the aim is to shoot as many balls as possible into the pockets using the special ‘Pokémon Plunger’. The goal is to try and beat the high scores on the different stages and become a genuine Pokémon Pinball Champion.

*Pokémon Pinball Mini has three different play modes, including Quest, Time Attack and Score Attack.

*Quest Mode consists of 70 stages in total, each having a different objective for the player to complete in order to clear the stage.

*Time Attack mode contains 10 stages. In this mode, a limited amount of time is available to complete the stage. The quicker the stage is completed the higher the score earned.

*Score Attack mode also consists of 10 stages. In this mode you must exceed the target score before the time runs out. If there is still time remaining, players can battle on for an even higher score.

An entertaining option is the “Catching Pokémon Stage”. Players have a chance to catch Pokémon here to add to their collections and use them when necessary.

title: Mini Cookie
notes: Mini Cookie is a tech demo where the player controls a hungry bear, eating the cookies scattered all over the screen.

title: Petals Around The Rose
notes: It is called “Petals Around the Rose” and the name is significant! The number that matches each throw of the dice can be positive even or zero. If you manage to answer at least 6 times the correct number of petals around the rose you are allowed into fellowship of the rose and thus sworn to secrecy!

images.box_front: Images/Nintendo Pokemon Mini/Box - Front/North America/Petals Around The Rose-01.png
images.screenshot: Images/Nintendo Pokemon Mini/Screenshot - Gameplay/Petals Around The Rose-01.png

title: Galactix
notes:
You have to fight the aliens to protect your home, your family and your satelite-TV! Fight the aliens in three battles and kill as many as you can! 
Shake your space ship to ignite a destructive bomb and blast all aliens away if you are in trouble, but be aware that you only have three of these bombs!

To fire the laser you just press the "A" control of your spaceship repeatedly. Be aware that you only have three space ships, if the aliens destroy
the whole fleet the earth is lost!

Good luck!

title: PokeMaze
notes: Help Pikachu to find his way out of the puzzle!

title: Pokémon: Tetris
notes: As a variation on the Tetris gameplay them, the game used the motion detection feature of the Pokémon Mini hardware for the players to rotate the falling tetrominoes, and the player received a mild force feedback response to clearing lines of blocks. During play, removal of lines of blocks will unlock Pokémon creatures from Pokémon Gold and Silver, which are collected in an 'Pokédex'. The game features a simultaneous two-player mode using the infra-red connection between two Pokémon Mini handhelds.

title: Pokémon: Puzzle Collection Vol. 2
notes: Pokémon Puzzle Collection Vol. 2 is the Japan only sequel to Pokémon Puzzle Collection. Two puzzles return: Motion Puzzle, where tiles are switch around to form the correct Pokémon image, and Shadow Puzzle, where shapes are rotated and placed to form a Pokémon's relative silhouette. There are also two new puzzles. In Pick-Up Puzzle, an arrangement of Poké Balls lies on the floor. The player's Pokémon must clear them by moving over them in one line without isolating any of them. And in Stretch Puzzle, a grid is shown, with black and white boxes. The white boxes are empty, and the black boxes have numbers on them. The numbers represent bars that can be extended to take up the empty spaces. The goal is to fill up each empty space, meaning the placement of the bars is crucial to success.

title: Loopover
notes:
Loopover is based on the 2 dimensional Rubik’s Cube game of the same name which was made by Cary Huang.
Rotate rows and columns in order to sort the letters in alphabetical order (in English reading order).

title: Pokémon: Snorlax's Lunch Time
notes: Snorlax’s Lunch Time is an unused Pokémon Party Mini mini game that could be found amongst the other mini games in Pokémon Channel for the Nintendo GameCube.

title: Sonic Arena
notes: Sonic Arena is a game where you must destroy the robots of Dr.Robotnik and score as many points as possible while doing it! Available in English, French and Japanese.

title: Pokémon: Race Mini
notes: In Pokémon Race mini, you control a Pikachu who races other Pokémon. The game is a combination of racing and platforming elements. The race has three laps. You must jump onto higher and lower platforms, as well as climb walls that are too high, and avoid crashing into walls. Every lap, you are given a power-up. Holding the B button charges this, and releasing lets you rocket forward at high speed.
